description: Inspect, operate, and author Microsoft Power Automate cloud flows from an agent context.
name: io.github.sapientsai/power-automate-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Application (client) ID of your Entra app registration (multi-tenant public client).
environmentVariables.name: AZURE_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Tenant GUID. Required for the Flow audience ('common' fails with AADSTS50059).
environmentVariables.name: AZURE_TENANT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Client secret — only for clientCredentials mode.
environmentVariables.name: AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable mutating tools (default read-only).
environmentVariables.name: ENABLE_WRITE_OPS

environmentVariables.description: Environment id used when a tool omits 'environment'.
environmentVariables.name: DEFAULT_ENVIRONMENT
